purpose: Cost-ordered, result-blind Phase 2b source-screening cascade that spends deep-review work only after cheaper eligibility and feasibility signals are exhausted.
terminal_status_note: Stages before exact-revision inspection order work only. They never mutate candidate decisions or inclusion-rule values. Existing preregistered terminal rules remain the only exclusion paths.
design_change_note: This artifact changes operational screening order, not source frames, quotas, eligibility rules, instruction-discovery assumptions, or terminal evidence. Any future change to those contracts requires a protocol amendment and renewed review of the supporting research and preregistration rationale.

cost_scale.meaning: A higher rank is expected to require strictly more remote data, repository materialization, environment work, or human semantic judgment. Ranks are ordering constraints, not measured dollar or wall-clock estimates.

stage_sequence.action: Validate unique identities, source references, hashes, frozen decisions, and summary counts; perform no work on already terminal rows.
Route the 34 local-history rows to a separate source-adaptation queue; do not spend external-source screening work on them.
Advance signal-positive rows and defer none-observed rows without treating absence at current HEAD as exact-revision evidence.

stage_sequence.manual_review_scope: Only the three GitHub NOASSERTION license bodies; the other 30 repositories use the pinned GitHub SPDX response.
stage_sequence.action: Completed for the 66 file-only candidate rows across 33 repositories. Advance 64 rows and route two suspected-ineligible rows to exact-revision confirmation; keep every current-HEAD classification nonterminal.

Completed for all 106 signal-positive rows. Advance 27 eligible rows plus four suspected-ineligible confirmation rows; defer 18 scope-review and 57 no-test-touch rows without changing candidate decisions.

Completed for the 31-row GitHub work queue. All source lineages and changed-path sets validated; 27 exact licenses pass, three copyleft licenses and one no-license base fail, and one current-HEAD PolyForm signal is rescued by an MIT candidate base but returns to scope review.

Completed for all 25 newly advanced exact trees. Five trees have no discovered project instruction, three use byte-equivalent CLAUDE.md-to-AGENTS.md symlinks, one uses an explicit semantic adapter, and sixteen contain material one-sided active guidance. Nine pass and sixteen terminate on instruction parity; with previously-passed doc_parser #288, ten rows advance.

Completed for all ten parity-passing rows. Source semantics terminally exclude three translation-only tasks and one multi-optimization issue; all six survivors reproduce with intended base-negative and solution-positive controls and advance to selected-for-task-authoring without candidate-agent execution.

aao-local-history-through-0e32241.reason: Exact code lineage and repository license exist, but no native task statement exists.

swebench-multilingual-at-2b7aced.reason: The dataset card license does not establish upstream code rights at each recorded base revision.

terminal_or_pass_evidence_boundaries: exact candidate task statement and hash
license or use basis read at the exact revision
manual boundedness and safety judgment tied to the source statement
next_actions: Review solution scope for the rescued MIT-at-base row after the existing 18 scope-review rows; keep 57 no-test-touch rows deferred.
Freeze independent final evaluator assertions and validity-review roles for the 13 selected-for-task-authoring rows only after enough language/category yield exists; do not run candidate agents yet.
After the current signal-positive queues, screen the 300 SWE-bench rows by 41 upstream repositories for pinned license and dataset terms before deeper task review.
known_limitations: Rank-3 license classifications observe current default-branch HEAD and remain priority signals only; rank 5 separately resolved exact candidate revisions for the 31-row priority batch.
The earlier mechanical prefilter covered only one current priority row, so the dedicated linked-solution artifact independently covered all 106 signal-positive rows rather than extrapolating it.
Git and GitHub rendered diff bytes can differ for binary/index metadata; exact-base scope uses the complete changed-path set, which matched for all 31 rank-5 rows.
Ordinal cost ranks encode an intended order, not measured latency or API usage. Actual measurements should be appended without reordering stages after outcomes are known.
No cheap signal or parity result is allowed to relax the 60-task language/category quotas or select a candidate after observing agent performance.

Rank 7 proves screening controls, not final evaluator validity. In particular, small-village #54 still requires an independent reviewer to confirm that offline roster invariants cover the source's hosted three-client E2E sentence without narrowing the task.
